entries.summary: Implemented document processing pipeline: PDF extraction (pdfjs-dist with local worker), DOCX extraction (mammoth.js), XLSX extraction (SheetJS), TXT/MD extraction with encoding fallback, PPTX extraction (jszip + DOMParser), extractor factory routing by extension, semantic chunking algorithm ported from Python (abbreviation-protected sentence splitting, overlap calculation, page mapping, SHA256 doc IDs via Web Crypto API), Documents page UI (drag-and-drop upload, progress tracking, IndexedDB persistence, document list with delete). All browser-side, offline-first.

metadata.plan_id: HTML5 Web Version — Browser-Side Inference + API Hybrid Architecture

top_rejection_reasons: CDN dependency for PDF.js worker violates OFFLINE-FIRST architecture (task 4.1)
Duplicate filename matching via find() instead of index-based iteration (task 4.5)
ExtractionError plain object not caught by instanceof Error check (task 4.5)
lessons_learned: OFFLINE-FIRST means no CDN dependencies — PDF.js worker must be bundled locally via Vite ?url import, not loaded from cdnjs. Reviewer caught this as CRITICAL.
Duplicate filename handling requires index-based matching, not name-based find(). When mapping File[] to entries, use same-index iteration since both arrays are built from the same source.
ExtractionError is a plain object { fileName, error, stage }, not an Error instance. Error handling must check for the 'error' property on the caught object, not just instanceof Error.
Parallel Stage B gates work correctly — reviewer and test_engineer dispatched together saves significant time vs sequential.
Test engineer reported 77 tests PASS for task 4.5 — first task where test execution actually worked in this phase.

entries.summary: Phase 4 implemented a complete browser-side document processing pipeline: PDF (pdfjs-dist), DOCX (mammoth), XLSX (SheetJS), PPTX (jszip+DOMParser), TXT/MD extraction, semantic text chunking (faithful Python port), IndexedDB persistence, and Documents page with drag-and-drop upload. All 5 tasks completed with drift APPROVED and 77 tests passing. Council returned CONCERNS (24 advisory findings — PPTX selector, fileType bug, test theater, O(n²) findPage — all non-blocking).

metadata.plan_id: HTML5 Web Version — Browser-Side Inference + API Hybrid Architecture

top_rejection_reasons: CDN worker URL violates offline-first constraint
files.find() by name fails on duplicate filenames
ExtractionError message extraction assumed Error instance instead of plain object
lessons_learned: PDF.js worker must use Vite ?url import for offline bundling — CDN breaks offline-first constraint
ExtractionError is a plain object not Error instance — catch blocks must check .error property
Duplicate filenames require index-based matching, not name-based find()
Test theater pattern: extractor tests asserted on mock shapes instead of calling real implementations — needs real npm install before tests are meaningful
PPTX namespace selectors (a\:t) are non-standard CSS — need getElementsByTagNameNS for cross-browser support
